stemHtml: ICAO Doc 9613 defines a set of navigation specifications for different airspace concepts. The navigation specification RNP 2 is for…

options.a: The en-route phase of flight in oceanic/remote and continental areas.
options.b: Arrival, approach (except for the final approach), and departure phases of flight.
options.c: En-route, arrival, and departure phases of flight.
options.d: Arrival, approach, and departure phases of flight.
